text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everything's been going well since I've become Matikanetannhauser's
trainer. As she gazes at the clouds today though, she has something
on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm, I kinda want to mix it up with my training today...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't get me wrong! That isn't to say that your regimen isn't
plenty stimulating enough!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's just that I saw some really interesting training ideas on TV
yesterday. Some runners actually do triathlons and even play tag!
choice_data_list:
(Huh. Something like that might be nice for a
change.)

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Indeed! And I've got just the idea for the both of you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey there, Director!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I happened to be strolling over yonder when I heard you speaking of
novel training ideas. So listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: How would you like to get in some cardio, improve upon your ingenuity on the track, and build up some mental fortitude—all while playing a game?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: I speak of cops and robbers, of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Loving the idea, Matikanetannhauser enthusiastically ropes plenty of
other participants into our special training session.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Look at all this space! I didn't even know that we had access to a field
like this!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It appears you can make a special request to use these grounds if
your training calls for it. We'll have no problem performing to our
utmost here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's get this party started! First, I'll explain the rules.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Five of us will make up the cop team, and five of us will be the
robbers. The cops will try to catch the robbers within the time limit!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
If even one robber manages to stay out of the cops' grasp when time's
up, then their whole team wins! But if the cops catch all the robbers,
then they win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Robbers still on the loose can rescue captured teammates, so the
cops gotta stay sharp until the very end.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The winners will be treated to a super schmancy parfait, so be sure to
give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Rock, paper, scissors, shoot! Shoot! ...Shoot! ...Shoot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right, let's get to robbin'!

text_block_list.name: Robber Team
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Our unit will apprehend these perps in record time. Officers, move
out!

text_block_list.name: Cop Team
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A heated game of cops and robbers begins. Certain crooks find
themselves in the slammer without much recourse, however.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Grrr! This sucks, this sucks, this SUCKS! I almost got away too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Too bad. I guess the local precinct really knows what they're doing.
So who hasn't been caught yet... Whoa, only Tannhauser? Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but she can really put up a fight when her head's in the game. We
can still win this! Keep it up, Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Maybe mayhaps I'm the only one left? Yikes, what do I do?
Should I try to go save them? I'll have to get behind them somehow...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Nothin' to it but to do it! Ei!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hm? I saw someone duck into the bushes over there. After her!

text_block_list.name: Cop A
text_block_list.text: Stop right there, Machitan! We've caught you red-handed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Phew, they're way too sharp!

text_block_list.name: Cop B
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Only a... little more... You should just turn yourself in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Master thief Machitan doesn't get caught so easily!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We've got plenty of officers rested and ready to tap in at multiple
points. Give it up Tannhauser, you're finished.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff... Ha... I don't... think sooo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, whoooa! Machitan's got some serious power! She just keeps
juking 'em!

text_block_list.name: Robber A
text_block_list.text:
It's been almost twenty minutes straight of this. How is she not totally
exhausted by now?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's just the kind of runner Tannhauser is.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... pant... wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: We're getting nowhere, officers. We need a new formation—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And there's my opening! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Machitan! YES! She's comin' to save us! You seriously rock!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff... Geh... Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The master thief manages to give her pursuers the slip and reach the
jail, but then...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: OUCH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...She slams headfirst into a tree and crumples onto the grass.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser, in custody!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mumuu... I was so close to getting away with it too...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Still, that was one heck of a fight. Good on you for pushing so hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The players on both teams are moved at having witnessed
Tannhauser's display of willpower and grit.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Muh... That's frustrating. I feel like I was so close, but I can never
seem to win in the end.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Even back in my days at the junior club, I would sometimes get
sick before races, not to mention the nosebleeds... It's always
something.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Indeed! Matikanetannhauser can be a little slapdash.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Director! We just got back from the game! Wait, "slapdash"?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Though I think we can say that's a story of the past! Not
all can claim to face such lofty ambitions with as steady a mind as
you.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I see only the brightest of light emanating from our future star! I'm
expecting great things, and that is all I have to say! Ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, that really helps. The director actually comes out to cheer me
up when I'm feeling down quite often.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The director's words about Tannhauser ring true to me. I've got to
make sure she gets her chance to accomplish great things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together with that amazing performance in today's cops and robbers
game, I can't help but feel a renewed sense of excitement for her
future.
